name: mcp-suite
description: MCP servers from the mcp-suite project, installable as Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: notes
plugins.description: Local markdown notes: ranked + semantic search, tags, todos, a wiki-link knowledge graph, daily notes, templates, and slash-command workflows.

plugins.name: files
plugins.description: Sandboxed local filesystem: read, search (glob + grep), token-efficient edits, copy/move, soft-delete trash, zip, checksums, and dedup.

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub: search repos/code/issues, read repos/issues/PRs/files, list notifications, create issues — via OAuth device flow or a token.
